# Day-to-day QA tasks performed by an Automation engineer / Software Tester 

# How to replace with AI? 

1. Requirement analysis for the new user stories added in Jira or Azure. - COMPLETED 
2. Design the test cases for each and every user story and upload the same in Jira or Azure. -COMPLETED
3. Execute each and every test case with detailed test steps, collect the evidences, and also create the defects. -COMPLETED
4. Identifying the regression cases to automate 
5. Building the new framework to automate our application. 
6. Design automation test scripts and complete the automation task. 
7. Maintain the automation test scripts whenever there are any changes added in the application. 
8. Deploy the code in the cloud repository and run through the CI/CD pipeline.
